{{Shell
|name={{PAGENAME}}
|image={{PAGENAME}}.png
|description=Allegedly a secret technology from outer space, the Snail Shell can transform the owner in specific situations, but only the chosen one can use it.
|affct=FAME
|hard=ATK
|source=[[Altar_Fights#Demon_Lords|Ultra Giant]] fight in the [[Altar]]
|color=purple
|earth=6
|water=6
|fire=7
|wind=7
|form=Zombie
|element=Fire
|realm=Rift
|orangehard=ATK
}}
